message:
feat(build): integrate beads tracking for build progress

Add BeadsTracker to track build progress against beads issues:
- Add --bead-id flag to associate builds with beads issues
- Update bead to in_progress at build start
- Close bead with success message on completion
- Add failure notes on build errors (keeps in_progress)
- Non-blocking: beads failures don't fail the build

The tracker integrates with run_guided, run_auto, and run_interactive_build
modes, and is passed through resume sessions as well.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
